Game.Name: Jigsaw Party (Japan)
Game.plot: Pieces is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Prism Kikaku and published by Hori,which was released in Japan in 1994.Cheat: Stealing PiecesTo see the art gallery (in Jigsaw Party), press B, X, Y, A on the HORI logo in that exact order. If done correctly, the background will turn yellow and you will be taken to a screen where you can see the puzzles in the game by genre and number. You must reset in order to play the game normally.
